ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: vegetable oils non-hydrogenated 50% (rapeseed 21%, sunflower 12%, shea, flax 5 %, coconut),quot,, water, sea salt, emulsifiers: sunflower lecithin and mono-diglycerides of fatty acid, corrector of acidity: citric acid, natural flavors, coloring: carotenoids, vitamin d,
